transcript.text: Hello, living in Lafayette, Vlog, the 16th of May, 2013.

Well, because I worked really late.
Just, I think, on the video and they're not tying up other things.
And then...
And insomnia, I forgot to take my pills.
I need to remember to take my herbal pills.
I have two different kinds of herbal sleeping pills that I take.
It takes about an hour to activate.
Anyways, I guess I was kind of tired, so I slept in today.
I think I got up at like 9.30 or something, 10.
And then I organized my van because I didn't have the time to do that yesterday.
And then, yeah, and then I realized...
See, I was a little bit stressed out about not working.
You know, not having any money.
So I decided to...
You know, one way to fix money problems is to get...
You make money.

Oh, my friends.
The window washing, have work for me.

You know, if work comes around June.
Because that's kind of the beginning of summer, I guess.
Because it has been kind of rainy.
It rained a little bit today.

Or two weeks, I'm going to not spend any money, even a single penny.
And I'm not going to leave the house even once.
I think I'm going to retire.
I think I'm going to retire and hang up the cleats after my successful one-day career as a bicycle racer.

So if somebody takes my stage victory, maybe I'll have to re-evaluate.

You know, a little minor adjustments.

And then I'll reevaluate things at the beginning of June.
